world_news.title: British woman died in Ghana trying to recoup money from scammers, inquest told
world_news.summary:
Janet Fordham died in crash after travelling to see man who claimed he would help to recover money from earlier scams

A British woman who was scammed out of up to £1m in a string of so-called romance frauds died in a road crash after travelling to west Africa to try to recoup some of her lo...

world_news.title: Heatwaves, floods and wildfires pose rising threat to democracy, report finds
world_news.summary:
Research shows natural hazards linked to climate crisis disrupted 23 elections in 18 countries in 2024

Democracy is under mounting threat from the climate crisis, with new analysis documenting how elections are increasingly shaped not only by political forces but also by floods, wildfires a...

world_news.title: What to know about the Trump indictment on the eve of his court appearance
Haberman reveals why Trump attacked judge and his family in speech
world_news.summary: CNN political contributor Maggie Haberman explains the reasoning behind Donald Trump's attacks on the judge and his family during a speech at his Mar-a-Lago resort after he was arraigned on felony charges.

world_news.title: Sabastian Sawe smashes two-hour barrier to make history at London Marathon
world_news.summary: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.

world_news.title: Syria puts first Assad-era official on trial in Damascus
world_news.summary: Atef Najib, ex-head of political security in Deraa province, is charged with 'crimes against the Syrian people'.

world_news.title: King’s security for US state visit to be reviewed after shooting at Trump dinner
world_news.summary: Buckingham Palace said talks are taking place to review ‘what degree the events of Saturday evening may or may not impact on the operational planning for the visit’

world_news.summary: The six-year-old was pronounced dead at the scene

world_news.title: ‘Very reasonable’ for King Charles to speak to Trump about Falklands row
world_news.summary: Downing Street has insisted the islands’ sovereignty is ‘not in question’, but Argentina has renewed calls for talks with the UK over the Falklands

world_news.title: Palace holding talks over plans for King's US visit after Washington shooting
world_news.summary: The King is "being kept fully informed of developments" after the shooting, Buckingham Palace says.

world_news.title: Starmer insists ‘vast majority’ of Labour MPs support him despite Mandelson scandal
world_news.summary: As the prime minister faces existential questions about his future in power, he said he still believes he can win the next election

world_news.title: Sebastian Sawe breaks London marathon record with first run under two hours
world_news.summary: Kenyan athlete breaks Kelvin Kiptum’s previous world record of 2:00:35; Ethiopia's Assefa retains her women's crown.

world_news.summary: Timeline reveals assassination attempts on Trump, including incidents during his presidency and campaign rallies.

world_news.summary: Death of key figure seen as big blow for Mali's military government as fighting with armed groups continues.

world_news.title: What we know about the suspected ‘assassination attempt’ on Donald Trump
world_news.summary: A man armed is in custody after trying to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner, which Trump was attending.

world_news.title: Iranian Negotiators Set to Return to Pakistan to Try to Revive Truce Talks
world_news.summary: It was not clear whether President Trump would send his negotiators for a new round of discussions after abruptly calling off a trip by his top advisers on Saturday.

world_news.title: Higher prices could last for eight months after Iran war, minister says
world_news.summary: Officials are monitoring stock levels and planning for any potential disruptions to the supply chain.

world_news.title: Watch: How gunfire sparked chaos at Trump press dinner
world_news.summary: President Trump and Vice-President Vance were rushed off the stage, after gunshots were heard at the event at the Washington Hilton hotel.

world_news.title: Suspected gunman identified as 31-year-old Californian
world_news.summary: The man arrested at the event attended by President Trump has been named in US media as Cole Tomas Allen from California.

world_news.title: Trump Describes His Mind-Set After Shooting at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
world_news.summary: Very little was clear about what had happened at the Washington Hilton on Saturday night. But the president wanted to talk about it.

world_news.title: U.S. Sanctions Zigzag in New World of Economic Warfare
world_news.summary: With oil prices in mind, the Trump administration has deployed a haphazard approach to sanctions on Russia and Iran.

world_news.title: California Man Identified as Cole Tomas Allen in Custody After Shooting at Dinner Attended by Trump
world_news.summary: Shots were fired at the hotel hosting the White House correspondents’ dinner. Authorities said the attack was carried out by a lone gunman who was brought down by the Secret Service.

world_news.title: How the War in Iran Is Draining the U.S. of Critical Weapons
world_news.summary: The United States has blown through weapons as the cost of the war in Iran has hit nearly $1 billion a day. Our national security correspondent Eric Schmitt explains how American costs may go beyond the financial.

world_news.summary:
Al-Qaida-linked group JNIM claims responsibility for strikes on airport in capital, Bamako and four other cities

world_news.title: ‘Astonishing’ discovery could help save children from deadly disfiguring condition

A previously unknown species of bacteria found in patients with noma could be key to creating treatments for the neglected tropical disease
